title: asplenium ruta-muraria subsp. dolomiticum
intro: Asplenium ruta-muraria subsp. dolomiticum is a rare, calciphilous fern native to the Dolomite Alps in Europe. It is also known as the rock spleenwort, a type of vascular plant that grows on limestone rocks. The medicinal properties of Asplenium ruta-muraria subsp. dolomiticum are attributed to its high content of flavonoids, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and act as an antioxidant, and it can be prepared as a herbal tea or tincture for medicinal purposes.
